item.title: Twisted Couple Who “Melted” Baby Girl Alive
item.description: A horrifying case of cruelty shocked the nation when a twisted couple carried out unthinkable acts against a child. What drove them to such brutality, and how was justice finally served?

media:content.media:title: Twisted Couple Who “Melted” Baby Girl Alive

item.title: The Creepy Neighbour Who Wouldn’t Take No
item.description: What happens when persistence turns dangerous? This neighbour’s refusal to accept rejection escalated into a disturbing case that left everyone unsettled.

media:content.media:title: The Creepy Neighbour Who Wouldn’t Take No
media:content.media:description: What happens when persistence turns dangerous? This neighbour’s refusal to accept rejection escalated into a disturbing case that left everyone unsettled.

item.title: Christa Pike: America’s Youngest Woman With Such a Sentence
item.description: At just 18 years old, Christa Pike was convicted of the brutal 1995 murder of fellow student Colleen Slemmer in Knoxville, Tennessee. Her 1996 death sentence made her one of the youngest women ever condemned in the modern U.S. death penalty era. Decades later, Pike remains the only woman on Tennessee’s death row, her case marked by appeals, prison incidents, and renewed scrutiny as the state considers carrying out its first female execution in 200 years. What drove her to commit such a crime, and how has her case shaped the debate over capital punishment?

media:content.media:title: Christa Pike: America’s Youngest Woman With Such a Sentence
media:content.media:description: At just 18 years old, Christa Pike was convicted of the brutal 1995 murder of fellow student Colleen Slemmer in Knoxville, Tennessee. Her 1996 death sentence made her one of the youngest women ever condemned in the modern U.S. death penalty era. Decades later, Pike remains the only woman on Tennessee’s death row, her case marked by appeals, prison incidents, and renewed scrutiny as the state considers carrying out its first female execution in 200 years. What drove her to commit such a crime, and how has her case shaped the debate over capital punishment?

item.title: Barbara Opel: A Mother’s Sinister Manipulation
item.description: Barbara Opel orchestrated a chilling plan, manipulating those around her to commit murder. How did a mother’s influence spiral into a crime that shocked her community?

item.title: The Shocking Case of Mick Philpott
item.description: Mick Philpott’s story stunned the UK when a fire claimed the lives of six of his children. Was it a tragic accident or a deliberate plan that exposed a twisted scheme?
